name: Text
description: A single-line text field.

name: Password
description: A single-line text field where the characters are masked.

name: Checkbox
description: A checkbox that can be toggled on or off.

name: Radio
description: A radio button for selecting one option from a set.

name: Button
description: A clickable button.

name: Date
description: A control for entering a date (year, month, and day).

name: Datetime Local
description: A control for entering a date and time, with no time zone.

name: Email
description: A field for entering an e-mail address.

name: File
description: A control that lets the user select a file.

name: Hidden
description: A control that is not displayed but whose value is submitted to the server.

name: Image
description: A graphical submit button.

name: Month
description: A control for entering a month and year.

name: Number
description: A control for entering a number.

name: Range
description: A control for entering a number whose exact value is not important (like a slider).

name: Reset
description: A button that resets all form controls to their initial values.

name: Search
description: A single-line text field for entering search strings.

name: Submit
description: A button that submits the form.

name: Tel
description: A control for entering a telephone number.

name: Time
description: A control for entering a time (hour, minute, second, and fraction of a second).

name: URL
description: A field for entering a URL.

name: Week
description: A control for entering a date consisting of a week-year number and a week number.

name: Color
description: A color picker.

name: Textarea
description: A multi-line text input control.

name: Select
description: A drop-down list.

name: Multi-Select
description: A multi-select list.
